displayName: [Baseline] Require phishing-resistant MFA for all admins

_metadata.purpose: Force phishing-resistant MFA (FIDO2 / Windows Hello / Certificate-based) for all directory role holders. Highest-value compromise targets get the strongest auth requirement.
deployment_notes: The includeRoles array lists template IDs for: Global Administrator, Application Administrator, Authentication Administrator, Billing Administrator, Cloud Application Administrator, Conditional Access Administrator, Exchange Administrator, Helpdesk Administrator, Password Administrator, Privileged Authentication Administrator.
Add or remove role template IDs per your tenant's admin role usage.
Replace <user-id-break-glass> with the object ID of your break-glass account. Break-glass is excluded by design — it must be reachable when MFA infrastructure fails.
Deploy in report-only first. Confirm all admins have registered FIDO2 or Windows Hello before switching to 'enabled'.
